<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Isabela_(province)" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Isabela (province)">Isabela</a>: 61.96% (Marcos win)</li>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Guimaras" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Guimaras">Guimaras</a>: 58.57% (Robredo win)</li>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iloilo" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Iloilo">Iloilo</a>: 57.25% (Robredo win)</li>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Kalinga_(province)" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Kalinga (province)">Kalinga</a>: 56.63% (Marcos win)</li>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Davao_City" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Davao City">Davao City</a>: 52.39% (Cayetano win)</li>
<li><a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Nueva_Vizcaya" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Nueva Vizcaya">Nueva Vizcaya</a>: 51.20% (Marcos win)</li></ul>

</section><section aria-labelledby="Unofficial_tallies" data-mw-section-id="38" id="mwC2I"><div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Unofficial_tallies">Unofficial tallies</h3><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=2016_Philippine_presidential_election&amp;action=edit&amp;section=38" title="Edit section: Unofficial tallies"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>

</section><section aria-labelledby="Voter_demographics" data-mw-section-id="39" id="mwC_c"><div class="mw-heading mw-heading3"><h3 id="Voter_demographics">Voter demographics</h3><span class="mw-editsection"><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">[</span><a href="/w/index.php?title=2016_Philippine_presidential_election&amp;action=edit&amp;section=39" title="Edit section: Voter demographics"><span>edit</span></a><span class="mw-editsection-bracket">]</span></span></div>
<p id="mwC_g">These were the results of the <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Social_Weather_Stations" id="mwC_k" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Social Weather Stations">Social Weather Stations</a>' <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Exit_poll" id="mwC_o" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Exit poll">exit poll</a>:<sup about="#mwt881" class="mw-ref reference" data-mw='{"name":"ref","attrs":{},"body":{"id":"mw-reference-text-cite_note-212"}}' id="cite_ref-212" rel="dc:references" typeof="mw:Extension/ref"><a href="#cite_note-212" id="mwC_s"><span class="mw-reflink-text" id="mwC_w"><span class="cite-bracket" id="mwC_0">[</span>205<span class="cite-bracket" id="mwC_4">]</span></span></a></sup></p>
<table class="wikitable" id="mwC_8">
<tbody id="mwDAA"><tr id="mwDAE">
<th id="mwDAI" width="50%">Demographic subgroup</th><th id="mwDAM" width="10%">Duterte</th><th id="mwDAQ" width="10%">Roxas</th><th id="mwDAU" width="10%">Poe</th><th id="mwDAY" width="10%">Binay</th><th id="mwDAc" width="10%">Defensor Santiago</th></tr>
<tr id="mwDAg">
<th colspan="6" id="mwDAk">Socio-economic class</th></tr>
<tr id="mwDAo">
<td id="mwDAs">Class ABC (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Upper_class" id="mwDAw" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Upper class">upper class</a> and <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Middle_class" id="mwDA0" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Middle class">middle class</a>)</td><td id="mwDA4">45.9%</td><td id="mwDA8">18.9%</td><td id="mwDBA">16.4%</td><td id="mwDBE">11.8%</td><td id="mwDBI">6.2%</td></tr>
<tr id="mwDBM">
<td id="mwDBQ">Class D (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Working_class" id="mwDBU" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Working class">working class</a>)</td><td id="mwDBY">39.6%</td><td id="mwDBc">22.7%</td><td id="mwDBg">20.6%</td><td id="mwDBk">13.9%</td><td id="mwDBo">2.5%</td></tr>
<tr id="mwDBs">
<td id="mwDBw">Class E (<a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Underclass" id="mwDB0" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Underclass">underclass</a>)</td><td id="mwDB4">35.3%</td><td id="mwDB8">28.6%</td><td id="mwDCA">19%</td><td id="mwDCE">15%</td><td id="mwDCI">1.3%</td></tr>
<tr id="mwDCM">
<th colspan="6" id="mwDCQ">Educational attainment</th></tr>
<tr id="mwDCU">
<td id="mwDCY">College graduate</td><td id="mwDCc">49.2%</td><td id="mwDCg">19.8%</td><td id="mwDCk">13.4%</td><td id="mwDCo">10%</td><td id="mwDCs">6.7%</td></tr>
<tr id="mwDCw">
<td id="mwDC0">Some high school</td><td id="mwDC4">33.8%</td><td id="mwDC8">25.7%</td><td id="mwDDA">22.1%</td><td id="mwDDE">16.1%</td><td id="mwDDI">1.5%</td></tr>
</tbody></table>
<p id="mwDDM">According to Mahar Mangahas, the president of SWS, voters who belonged to a higher social class, was more educated, younger, Muslim, a member of the <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Iglesia_ni_Cristo" id="mwDDQ" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Iglesia ni Cristo">Iglesia ni Cristo</a>, from urban areas, and men tended to support Duterte. Duterte had less support from Catholics, from rural voters, and from women.<sup about="#mwt884" class="mw-ref reference" data-mw='{"name":"ref","attrs":{},"body":{"id":"mw-reference-text-cite_note-213"}}' id="cite_ref-213" rel="dc:references" typeof="mw:Extension/ref"><a href="#cite_note-213" id="mwDDU"><span class="mw-reflink-text" id="mwDDY"><span class="cite-bracket" id="mwDDc">[</span>206<span class="cite-bracket" id="mwDDg">]</span></span></a></sup> <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/De_La_Salle_University" id="mwDDk" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="De La Salle University">De La Salle University</a> political science professor Julio Teehankee described it as the middle class' emergence of a "counter-elite challenging the old elite," with Duterte voters being seen as "who are taxed the most and financing Daang Matuwid. They are working hard for their families and the country and yet they are the ones who suffer from lack of public service, land and air traffic. Breakdown of peace and order corruption, <a class="mw-redirect" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ninoy_Aquino_International_Airport_bullet_planting_scandal" id="mwDDo" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Ninoy Aquino International Airport bullet planting scandal">laglag-bala</a>. The poor have their <a href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Conditional_cash_transfer" id="mwDDs" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Conditional cash transfer">conditional cash transfer</a> fund. The rich have their <a class="mw-redirect" href="https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Private-public_partnership" id="mwDDw" rel="mw:WikiLink" title="Private-public partnership">PPPs</a>."<sup about="#mwt887" class="mw-ref reference" data-mw='{"name":"ref","attrs":{},"body":{"id":"mw-reference-text-cite_note-214"}}' id="cite_ref-214" rel="dc:references" typeof="mw:Extension/ref"><a href="#cite_note-214" id="mwDD0"><span class="mw-reflink-text" id="mwDD4"><span class="cite-bracket" id="mwDD8">[</span>207<span class="cite-bracket" id="mwDEA">]</span></span></a></sup></p>
